Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil (Alberto Correa)
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Meeti S. Sudame of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff
/ moving party Alberto Correa as Successor-In-Interest to Gerry Lee Stone, Deceased

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL, LLC'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR ALBERTO CORREA AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO GERRY LEE STONE, DECEASED

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Alberto Correa is granted. Plaintiff received proper notice of this motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kim Richardson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5915 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil (Jennifer Ashcraft)
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order

APPEARANCES:
Meeti S. Sudame of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff
/ moving party Jennifer Ashcraft as Wrongful Death Heir of Gerry Lee Stone, Deceased

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL, LLC'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JENNIFER ASHCRAFT AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR OF GERRY GREEN STONE, DECEASED

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Jennifer Ashcraft is granted. Plaintiff received proper notice of this motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L.
